programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: The owners of a seedy bail bonds agency are really extortionists who keep crooks OUT of jail -- for hefty fees One of their clients balks at paying them off any more pulls a gun on them and tries to exit the office The female half of the group pulls out her own gun and drills the man through the head The two of them conspire to keep the dead man alive by sending the beefy male half of the team on a crime spree which imitates the modus operandi of the dead criminal

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: While fishing Hawke witnesses a woman who is dropped from a helicopter into a lake Hawke rescues her but the two men responsible are hot on his tail The rescued woman has difficulty remembering her identity and Hawke tries to help her

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two cousins Ryan Dallion and Micki Foster inherit an antiques shop from their uncle Together with his partner they must track down cursed objects that their devil-worshiping uncle had created The first object is a demonic killer doll

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy show off their best moves against a team of dance instructors who will stop at nothing to hold onto their car Matt and Sonia repossess a vehicle from a woman with the worlds most vindictive boyfriend Lou and Froy match muscle wits with a gang of vicious roadies

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia are caught in a desperate situation when the owner of their target car is struck by a heart attack Plus a repo becomes violent under the watchful eye of the finance company

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Phantom Rancher
programme.desc: Cowboy puts on a black mask and a black outfit to fight a gang of land-grabbing crooks

programme.title: The Three Mesquitters
programme.desc: When a group of World War 1 buddies head west to farmstead they run into trouble

programme.title: Public Cowboy Number 1
programme.desc: Rustlers using modern technology airplanes shortwave radios refrigerated trucks are Genes target

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict with a grudge against Lucas comes to town determined to kill him

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man and his young son fleeing danger are taken in by Lucas What Lucas doesnt know is that the man hasnt told him the real reason theyre on the run

programme.title: Gunsmoke S08E25 Quints Indian
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S08E25 Quints Indian

programme.title: Bonanza 318
programme.desc: Bonanza 318

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard foreign dictator Colonel Pellargo but are foiled by a clever assassin who himself shows up dead only a few days later However the disappearance of a local Irishman into Fabian Lavendors funeral parlor piques the agents curiosity -- and the cut-and-dried assassination becomes a far more complex intrigue

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are in the courtroom testifying in a case in which the probable cause for them to conduct a search of the suspects car is in question The probable cause is to be provided by a witness who is late arriving to court

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: The 12-year-old nephew of Dr Kimbles girlfriend arrives to live with her and recognizes him He hatches a plan with his neighborhood friends to catch him by purchasing a mail-order rifle

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A stuntman tries to break the worlds skin-diving record

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Hoodlums attack Mike after he explores the waters around a pier

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Major Parsons has apparently just completed his 25th mission making him eligible to be rotated back to the States out of the fighting something he celebrates with great relish However Gallagher has formulated a plan to knock out an exceptionally difficult target and it requires a pilot with qualifications that match Parsons to a tee The Major is definitely not inclined to volunteer with a guaranteed return to safety in hand especially since the assignment has the earmarks of a suicide mission No amount of persuasion budges him that is until General Britt discovers a technicality that leaves him at 24 completed missions instead of 25

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Alamo Joe catches up with Eric in a small town jail then attempts to grill him about his lycanthropy Eric tells him he still has hopes for a cure but later turns into a werewolf escapes from the jail and Alamo Joe is forced to kill him

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A series of deaths from bad prosthetic devices are blamed on product tampering

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A man seeks to increase his intelligence and become a world-renowned scientist but his quest results in the deaths of other researchers

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Indebted unhappy married couple Lou and Irene commit a life insurance fraud Lous brother Billy helps him fake his death and leave for Mexico But Irene and Billy fall in love and when Lou returns they claim they dont know him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A journalist tries to solve the case of a mysterious serial killer whos been killing homeless people all across the city What he doesnt realize is how deep the conspiracy behind the murders goes

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The deadliest of the species A woman pretends to love Max so she can kill him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: Hogans 315
programme.desc: Hogans 315

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is convinced that McHale and the 73 Crew are consorting with the enemy and when he cant get anyone to believe him he calls for a Naval Intelligence team to search McHales island for evidence So to get him to call off the search McHale and The Guys devise an elaborate scheme to make Binghamton think hes losing his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While on an unauthorized liberty in New Caledonia McHale and The Crew are all thrown in jail for various reasons during which time a crooked Frenchman steals the 73 to use for some crooked business McHale and The Crew must then scheme to get out of jail find the crook and get the 73 back before Binghamton returns from a Staff meeting

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After a pay phone spits out 4175 in coins Duke and Frankie are ecstatic about all the fun they can have spending it but good Samaritan Gomer is determined to return it to the phone company

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Duke Slater wins amateur comedy night at the Jade Club Dukes act is impressions with his feature on Sgt Carter the best part of his act Against all common sense and his friends advice Gomer invites Carter to Dukes encore performance

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E07
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E07

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E17
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E17

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After every number two man at CONTROL is killed Hymie becomes number two

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry changes after a near-death experience

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Polly befriends a city councilwoman who seems charming and polite but chews MacGillis out and pokes him in the stomach over laying off civilians from Camp Hollister Polly doesnt believe him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Never aired pitch pilot for the show Mitch breaks the fourth wall to narrate how he and Garner opened a detective agency in a nightclub called Nights They help a girl on the run from goons who want the mysterious artifact she has

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repos brand new season Sonias rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle and Lou Froy and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonias recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer but theres a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movies star have a checkered history Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A group of skiers are trapped inside a runaway train hurtling down a mountainside

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Taelons lend some of their dwindling core energy to Joshua Doors for a pilot cold fusion project but the energy is stolen leaving the Taelons vulnerable Jonathan Doors lives on as an AI in cyberspace

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team act as watchdogs protecting a secret and unprecedented meeting of international alien experts where they suspect one of them may be an alien

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane experiments with artificial earthquakes

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressa is taken hostage by a man with a score to settle with Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Dorcans demand that Moonbase Alpha hand over Maya so that the use of her brain stem can continue their immortal existence

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Daisy learns that Jessi Colter has recorded a song she wrote One problem Wheres the royalties shes due Thats what Bo and Luke try to find out as they infiltrate Hazzard County Commissioner Boss JD Hoggs record piracy operation

programme.title: Hercules 201
programme.desc: Hercules 201

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Augur is caught and placed in a special prison where he is placed in a sensory deprivation chamber An amoralist gets him out and wants Augur to help him steal the gold Zoor has on the mothership When Liam learns of what happened he tries to find Augur

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: The remains of an inmate at the Alcatraz Federal Prison was discovered between a wall during some repairs It was thought that the inmate Lou Kovic escaped 20 years earlier but Mike and Steve believe he was murdered

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must thwart four young Nazis from claiming Hitlers fortune which they plan to use to finance a Fourth Reich

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being shot Kimble is reunited with Sister Veronica whose help he needs to track down a lead about the one-armed man

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath helps an old friend Ward and his wife Nora after Ward becomes crippled in an accident partly Heaths fault Tensions arise when Ward tries to guilt Heath into giving him 5000 for a timber investment

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: While wagon master of a train Cheyenne trades for a Comanche prisoner of the Apaches because he notices the boy is white Cheyenne hopes to convince him to stay with them rather than return to the Comanche but prejudice may stop him

programme.desc: After Steve gets hit by a car Mike is demoted to patrolman for disobeying orders and threatening a mob boss

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: The Tommyknockers
programme.desc: The small town of Haven becomes a hot-bed of inventions all run by a strange green power device The whole town is digging something up in the woods and only an alcoholic poet can discover the secret of the Tommyknockers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.title: The Millionairess
programme.desc: A millionairess and a doctor cannot marry until they meet conditions set up by their respective parents

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Gary Vig as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids accidentally find Zandoras Box which can open doorways to many other places This may be their best chance of getting home but only Zandora herself knows how to use the box and she is trapped somewhere inside it

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The team encounters a band of children from another planet whose spaceship might bring them all home The only problem is that the ship is in Vengers hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to the Arab Emirate of Yatzanistan to protect Prince Akars sacred sword from falling into the wrong hands

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain search for a seismologist that MAD has kidnapped for their evil blackmail plot

programme.desc: The Renegades lure Leader-1 Turbo and Scooter into a trap full of hungry Zods

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: A damaged Turbo is repaired by two teenagers who unaware hes a GoBot enter him into a Grand Prix race; when the Renegades spot him the race turns into a demolition derby

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
